description: rustup's internal state file (${RUSTUP_HOME}/settings.toml, usually ~/.rustup/settings.toml). Not an official public interface (rustup's own docs say to use the CLI instead of editing this by hand), but the shape is stable and taken directly from the `Settings` struct in https://github.com/rust-lang/rustup/blob/main/src/settings.rs.

default_host_triple.description: Default host tuple, e.g. "aarch64-apple-darwin" (serialized as default_host_tuple in newer rustup, default_host_triple accepted as an alias)

default_toolchain.description: Name of the default toolchain, e.g. "stable-aarch64-apple-darwin"

overrides.description: Absolute directory path to toolchain name, populated by `rustup override set`

pgp_keys.description: Path or URL to additional PGP keys to trust

version.description: Settings file format version, currently always "12"

title: rustup settings.toml
